svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="FIFOCard EventBus Signals" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-824" dy="-287" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="FIFOCard EventBus Signal Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="600" x="500" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sw-view" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;swimlaneFillColor=#e8f0fc;" value="View Layer (UI)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="1540" x="30" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v-card" parent="sw-view" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Card
(Card.gd)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="60" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v-handqueue" parent="sw-view" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="HandCardQueue
(HandCardQueue.gd)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="330" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v-activeslot" parent="sw-view" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="ActiveCardSlot
(ActiveCardSlot.gd)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="650" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v-playing" parent="sw-view" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="PlayingCard
(PlayingCard.gd)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="970" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sw-ctrl" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;swimlaneFillColor=#fff8e0;" value="Controller (State Machine)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="230" width="1540" x="30" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-setup" parent="sw-ctrl" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="SetupState
(SetupState.gd)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="220" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-idle" parent="sw-ctrl" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="IdleState
(IdleState.gd)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="560" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c-playing" parent="sw-ctrl" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="PlayingCardState
(PalyingCardState.gd)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="880" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sw-model" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;swimlaneFillColor=#e8f5e8;" value="Model (Logic)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="1540" x="30" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m-gamemgr" parent="sw-model" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="GameManager
(GameManager.gd)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="390" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m-cardmgr" parent="sw-model" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;" value="CardManager
(CardManager.gd)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="740" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m-cardmgr-note" parent="sw-model" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#999999;fontStyle=2;" value="signals have no receivers
(dead code)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="740" y="125" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend-box" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=22;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Legend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="320" x="1250" y="920" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> src/autoload/EventBus.gd" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="380" y="920" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stats-box" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;fillColor=#f5f5f5;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#333333;" value="Active signals: 9

Unused placeholders: 7
Total defined: 19" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="620" y="920" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
